服を着直し、部屋を出る準備をした男にニナがそう問いかけると、<br>男は１度頷い:
When Nina asked the man—now dressed and ready—if he'd forgotten
anything, he nodded, then gave a start as if remembering.
それから男は、テーブルの上に置いてあったティーカップを手に取る。: Then the man picked up the teacup that was on the table.
あ……お茶をご所望でしたら、すぐに温かいものを入れ直して――: Oh... if you would like tea, I can brew a fresh, hot cup right away—
ニナにみなまで言わさず、男は冷めたハーブティーを一気に飲み干した。:
Without letting Nina finish, the man downed the cold herbal tea in one
gulp.
呆気にとられるニナだったが、すぐにまた笑顔になり――: Nina was taken aback, but quickly regained her smile—
しかし、男は静かに首を横に振った。: But the man silently shook his head.
え……門番の仕事を辞めて、故郷へ戻られるのですか？:
Oh... are you leaving your post as gatekeeper to return to your
hometown?
男は、ニナの入れてくれたハーブティーが、忘れようとしていた家族の笑顔と<br>故:
The man told her the herbal tea she had prepared reminded him of his
family's smiles and his hometown—things he had been trying to forget.
そして、故郷に戻って、もう１度ハーブを育てる仕事を再開したいと――:
He also said he wanted to return to his hometown and resume his
work growing herbs.
そう、ですか……それが、貴方様の決めたことでしたら……<br>わたくしは応援しま:
I see... so that is your decision, sir... I will support you. Please do
your best.
男はニナに感謝の言葉と、ハーブが採れたらニナ宛てに送ることを伝える。:
The man expressed his gratitude and said he would send Nina some
herbs once they were harvested.
はい、その日を楽しみにしています。<br>どうかお元気で。: Yes, I look forward to that day. Please take care.
ニナとの出会いが、疲れた男の背中を押すきっかけになったことは間違いない。<br>:
There was no doubt that meeting Nina had given the tired man the
push he needed. Nina watched him leave the room with a gentle smile.
